channel.title: Amartya Yadav's Blog
channel.description: Thoughts on technology, society, politics, and high-performance computing.

item.title: High-Fidelity Thermal Analysis: Benchmarking Posit Arithmetic on the UTTUNGA Platform
item.description: Numerical simulation in the automotive industry is evolving beyond simple geometries. As we move toward complex multi-material battery enclosures—combining high-conductivity Aluminum plates with insulating Carbon Fiber Reinforced Polymers (CFRP)—the ...

item.title: The Nostalgia of the Old Internet and Low Tech – Part 1
item.description: Often I find myself being overwhelmed by how much the Internet and tech have creeped into my life. The millennials, and even the weird category I fall into (born too late for the advent of the Internet, but early enough with I...

item.title: "I Don't Have Anything to Hide" — The Dangerous Myth
item.description: Apple was recently forced by the UK government to provide access to the encrypted data of Apple users—only in unencrypted form. Under the Investigatory Powers Act (IPA), firms are compelled to provide law enforcement agencies ...
